## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Andrew Bishara for the Managing Editor role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Profile:** Andrew Bishara has 10 years of content experience, including senior roles at agencies and leading content/SEO at The Personal Development School.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [**Core Skill:** A proven ability to standardize inconsistent content processes by creating style guides and training teams, which directly aligns with the role's need to define and refine AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [**AI Experience:** Uses custom GPTs for content generation and gap analysis, but emphasizes the critical need for rigorous human review to prevent plagiarism, ensure brand alignment, and verify facts.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**Role Alignment:** The role requires operating GrowthX's AI platform, Atlas, to produce client content and collaborating with engineering to improve the platform—a function Andrew Bishara finds a compelling "next step" in content.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)

## Topics

### Candidate Background

  - [10 years of content experience (since 2015) across agencies (Australia, Canada) and in-house roles.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Currently leads content and SEO at The Personal Development School, an online course platform.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Manages two content writers and is based in Calgary, Alberta.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Editorial Judgment & Process Improvement

  - [**Editorial Rubric:** Quality is judged by alignment with client brand, tone, and language.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
      - [**Example:** Tonal flexibility for a "fluffy" Botox brand vs. a professional medical one.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**Process Improvement Example:** Standardized inconsistent promotional emails at The Personal Development School.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [**Problem:** Disjointed emails and landing pages due to separate creation workflows, causing user confusion (e.g., conflicting disclaimers).](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
          - [Assigned one writer to own the full user journey (email → landing page).](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
          - [Created a structured email template (Problem → Solution → Brand Help).](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
          - [Developed a custom GPT to generate emails based on these standards.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
          - [Implemented a formal QA process to prevent launch errors by an external agency.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Gaining team and management buy-in for new processes.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)

### AI Tooling Experience

  - [**Content Generation:** Uses custom GPTs for emails, blogs, and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Method:** Feeds brand-specific content (e.g., YouTube transcripts) to train the AI on the founder's voice and style.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Gap Analysis:** Uses AI to identify missed opportunities (e.g., a missing schema markup).](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [**Key Learning:** Human oversight is non-negotiable.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Why:** To prevent plagiarism, ensure brand alignment, and verify facts.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Risk:** AI can pull competitor information or generate content inconsistent with brand values.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### The Managing Editor Role at GrowthX

  - [**Core Function:** Operate GrowthX's internal AI platform, Atlas, to produce client content.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Key Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Operate Pipelines:** Run Atlas's agentic workflows for editorial and programmatic SEO content.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
      - [**Edit Output:** Refine AI-generated content for client presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [**Improve Pipelines:**](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
          - [**Inputs:** Refine instructions and context documents (e.g., style guides) for the AI.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
          - [**Collaboration:** File engineering tickets to fix platform bugs or build new features for client needs.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**Team Structure:** Internal-facing role; account strategists manage client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [**Onboarding:** Fast-paced ramp-up (est. 4 weeks) using Notion documentation and hands-on Atlas training.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mariela:** Contact Andrew Bishara with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [**Matthew Panzarino:** Schedule follow-up interviews with other team members.](https://fathom.video/share/U7PsQcZ6EVq_Y6FdwEYHkaKoPbg26su9?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
